title: panicum refractum
intro: Panicum refractum, also known as Fringed Millet, is a type of grass native to tropical Asia, characterized by its feathery or fringed inflorescence and slender stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Panicum refractum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Panicum refractum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
